description: The system provides clear rationale and justification for resource optimization recommendations (e.g., cost savings, performance improvements) to motivate developers.

evidence.quote: Currently we provide them some dashboards to give them insights on their request and their limits. We are not really focusing on the project costs us that much, but really focusing on trying to get them to lower their request limits and to put effort in horizontal scaling... But yeah, that's, that's something where we're struggling with, yeah, providing them the correct data and the correct motivation to do to change something.
Also, you give a lot of recommendations but there is really no motivation on why you give these recommendations and that's something that we are looking for at the moment.

And I think providing that data is, is a difficult one. And yeah, analyzing it correctly. Yeah. We really don't have insights on how you calculate it, these recommendations. Yeah. And that makes it a bit more difficult to sell it to our developers.

description: The system allows export of cost data with all relevant labels (e.g., team, project, application) simultaneously to ensure complete data dimensions.

related_problem_ids.name: Challenges with integrating diverse private cloud infrastructure data and allocating pre-purchased resources

evidence.quote: There are gaps between what we have from the OpenShift cost export, which has only a subset of the labels in each export that we make. I think that's one of our primary problems right now. We can use labels to indicate or to group specific costs in the OpenShift cost management tool, but when we make an export, we actually have to choose one of the labels. We can't make selection of multiple labels by which we can export all at once, for example, to get all of the workloads with their respective, we, we have a label that we assign for teams. We have a label that we assign for projects and we have a label that we assign for the application itself, an app label. And those three labels, we would actually like to get in an export all at once, but right now we can only get one label that we have to, to select for.

So basically we're no, we're lacking a number of dimensions Yeah. In the exports that we, that are yeah. That are important for us to do the allocation and we suspect, well, we see that they are in open costs, otherwise those things have, because the labels have been given, but for some reason the di the the export doesn't give us Yeah. The possibility to, to have all the tags or the labels at once with, with the data.

acceptance_criteria: System successfully implements: The system allows export of cost data with all relevant labels (e.g., team, project, application) simultaneously to ensure complete data dimensions.
Implementation is measurable and observable
User can verify the behavior has occurred

acceptance_criteria: System successfully implements: The system includes namespace-level cost information in exports for finer-grained allocation.
Implementation is measurable and observable
